name: Manifest Schema
summary: Successfully defined and enhanced manifest v3 JSON Schema with comprehensive validation

tasks.notes: Found existing comprehensive schema that matches PLAN.md specification exactly
All required fields from manifest spec are included: $schema, meeting_id, status, status_history, source, meeting, participants, calendar_match, quality_gate, blocks, hitl, timestamps
Added detailed descriptions to key fields including status pipeline stages, source types, and block selection policies
Validated that validation script correctly validates compliant manifests and catches schema violations

acceptance_criteria.all_required_fields_defined: ✅ All fields from PLAN.md specification are included with proper validation
acceptance_criteria.validation_script_works: ✅ validate_manifest.py successfully validates manifests and catches errors

schema_features: Comprehensive field validation including regex patterns for meeting_id and time formats
Enum validation for status transitions, source types, meeting types, and block policies
Business logic validation in script for status history consistency and timestamp progression
Block accounting validation ensuring no overlaps between generated/failed/skipped
Email format validation for participant emails
validation_capabilities: Detailed error reporting with specific field violations
Business rule validation beyond schema (timestamp ordering, block consistency)

dependencies_satisfied: D1.4 - Legacy converter structure available for reference
next_steps: Schema is ready for use by downstream drops in Stream 2 (D2.2-D2.5) and Stream 3 processing modules
